recommended_actions_24h: Monitor Exim logs for suspicious activity
Isolate Exim servers from the internet if possible
recommended_actions_7d: Upgrade to Exim 4.99.3 or later when a patch is available
Implement additional security measures such as firewall rules and intrusion detection systems
title: CVE-2026-45185: Exim RCE
summary: [P1] Exim before 4.99.3 has a remotely reachable vulnerability in certain GnuTLS configurations, allowing arbitrary code execution. No patch is currently available, and there is no evidence of exploitation in the wild. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Exim is a mail transfer agent that can be exploited for remote code execution, affecting the framework layer.
